water_fun: Massive heated waterpark, resort pool, spa
kids_play: Jumping pillow, playground, flying fox, activities
pet_detail: Pet-friendly with off-leash dog park, dog wash facilities, and on-site doggy daycare available while visiting theme parks
best_for: This park is ideal for families seeking a resort-style experience with children who love water activities, positioned perfectly for theme park visits while offering enough on-site entertainment that you may never want to leave

water_fun: Two pools (one heated), waterfront beach access
kids_play: Jumping pillow, playground, games room, holiday activities
best_for: Active families with children who want a clean, entertaining base close to Gold Coast theme parks with waterfront views and excellent amenities

water_fun: Heated pools with slides, creek swimming enclosure
kids_play: Playground, pool slides, rental trikes, creek activities
pet_detail: Not pet friendly - dogs not permitted
best_for: Active families with children who want the unique combination of safe creek swimming, beach access, pool facilities, and Gold Coast convenience all in one location

park_name: NRMA Treasure Island Holiday Resort, Gold Coast
water_fun: Four pools plus waterslides and splash park
kids_play: Jumping pillow, wreck room, daily activities, mini golf
pet_detail: Pet friendly with designated areas and a small off-leash dog park; not permitted in all areas of the park
best_for: Active families with children under 12 seeking an activity-packed park base with pools, play facilities, and organized entertainment right on site while visiting Gold Coast attractions

water_fun: Heated pool, clean and well maintained
kids_play: Jumping pillow, small playground, open green spaces
pet_detail: Dogs welcome with complimentary dog wash token on arrival; dogs must be on leash; vaccination certificates required
best_for: Best for families with pets who value spacious sites, a beachside location within walking distance, and a relaxed, friendly park atmosphere over extensive on-site kids entertainment

water_fun: No pool; patrolled beach directly across road
kids_play: No playground; manager-organized activities and beach entertainment
best_for: Families with young children who value a safe, clean beachfront location with exceptional hosts who create daily activities and community experiences over traditional park infrastructure

water_fun: Nice pool with shallow area for toddlers
kids_play: Games room available, playground recently removed
pet_detail: No dogs allowed - smoke-free and pet-free park
best_for: Families with young children who prioritize beach access, cleanliness, and a peaceful smoke-free environment over extensive on-site kids' entertainment facilities

water_fun: No pool; beach directly across the road
kids_play: Kids entertainment room with games available
best_for: Beach-loving families with young to school-aged children who want to be steps from the sand and appreciate a central location near cafes, shops and coastal walks over resort-style amenities

water_fun: Heated pool with massive waterslide kids adore
kids_play: Ninja playground, standard play areas, occasional activities
best_for: Budget-conscious families with children who want affordable Gold Coast accommodation centered around pool fun and convenient access to beaches, markets, and theme parks.

water_fun: Netted swimming area in river nearby
kids_play: No dedicated playground mentioned in reviews
pet_detail: Dogs allowed, off-leash area available, dog treats provided, pets welcome in some villas and sites
best_for: Boating and fishing enthusiast families seeking short-term waterfront access who prioritise location over on-site entertainment and can manage insect challenges.
